Headline: #12 Roosevelt Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Central/Taylor
ShortDescription: EB #12 Roosevelt buses are temporarily rerouted via Harrison, Laramie, then resume their normal route on Roosevelt, due to street blockage near Central/Taylor.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #12 Roosevelt buses are temporarily rerouted via Harrison, Laramie, then resume their normal route on Roosevelt, due to street blockage near Central/Taylor.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
